meta.subtitle: First-playthrough · 100% Jiminy's Journal in one route · Proud
meta.scope: Mirrors cR0Ck's spoiler-free GameFAQs '100% Story' walkthrough (KH HD I.5+II.5 ReMIX, v4) chapter-for-chapter: 17 story chapters plus checklist phases for the aggregate Journal systems. Targets full Journal 100% on Proud — 99 Dalmatians, 46 Trinities, 13 Ansem's Reports, all postcards, Olympus Cups, 100 Acre Wood, White Mushroom masters, Clock Tower, Gummi blueprints, Synthesis (incl. Ultima Weapon), and every Final Mix superboss.
meta.secretEnding: Proud: win the Hades Cup. Standard: free all 99 Dalmatians AND complete the whole Journal (incl. all Trinities/minigames). Beginner: secret ending is impossible. This tracker targets Proud.
meta.confidencePolicy: Route order, collectible placement and missable callouts follow cR0Ck's walkthrough. The in-game Jiminy's Journal % is the ultimate source of truth — trust it over any wording here.
meta.remakeNote: Built pre-release on the HD Final Mix (1.5) baseline. Patch in any Switch 2 remaster changes on launch night — all data lives in this one JSON file.

phases.title: 1 · The Dream Start
phases.blurb: Tutorial island. Weapon/level choices, Kairi's item fetch quests, first Keyblade.

steps.title: 1.1 Weapon & growth choices
steps.do: Pick Staff (1st) + Sword (discard) for max 10 MP. Answer Selphie/Wakka/Tidus mostly Option 3 for a faster 41–99 curve.

steps.title: 1.2–1.5 Kairi's item quests
steps.do: Gather logs, cloth, rope, mushrooms, coconuts, fish, water, seagull egg. Optional: spar Wakka/Tidus/Selphie/Riku for real EXP (level ~6).

steps.title: 1.6 The Keyblade
steps.do: Storm hits; Sora gets the Keyblade and clears the first bosses.

phases.title: 2 · Traverse Town
phases.blurb: First hub. Postcards #1–6, Blue Trinity intro, Leon, Dalmatians house quest begins. [19 treasures]

steps.title: 2.1 District 1 & 2 postcards
steps.do: Climb behind the Accessories shop and hit the Items-shop fan; mail at the red mailbox. Enter the Dalmatians house to start the 99-puppy quest.

steps.title: 2.3 Fight Leon
steps.do: Beat Leon (must win to get the Elixir later). Talk to Yuffie for keyhole lesson; hit the clock to 7:00 for a rare Mythril chest.

steps.title: 2.4 Guard Armor
steps.do: Cutscene boss. Donald/Goofy join; Sora learns Fire, Goofy teaches Dodge Roll.

steps.title: 2.5 Blue Trinity sweep
steps.do: Learn Trinity Jump; grab the remaining postcards and sweep the world.

items.label: Opened Merlin's house (Fire on the door)
All 19 treasure chests in this world swept

phases.title: 3 · Wonderland
phases.blurb: Trickmaster, Blizzard, White-Mushroom Fire/Blizzard/Thunder masters begin. [18 treasures]

steps.title: 3.1 Prove Alice innocent
steps.do: Collect 4 evidences; navigate the scrambled Bizarre Rooms. Grab Blizzard.

items.label: Dalmatians 16, 17, 18 — Lotus Forest, on the lilies
Dalmatians 13, 14, 15 — Queen's Court special area (via the pond)

steps.title: 3.1 Trickmaster
steps.do: Boss. Use Fire. Reward: Ifrit's Horn accessory + Navi-G piece.

steps.title: 3.2 Back in Traverse
steps.do: With Blizzard, douse the entrance candles for a Defense Up. Sweep Wonderland.

items.label: All 18 treasure chests in this world swept

phases.title: 4 · Olympus Coliseum
phases.blurb: Phil Cup, Cerberus, Hero License, Cloud. [8 treasures]

steps.title: 4.1 Coliseum entrance
steps.do: Blue Trinities flank the entrance.

steps.title: 4.1 Cerberus
steps.do: Clear matches 1–6 (no heals), skip/lose match 7 (Cloud), then beat Cerberus. Get Hero License + Sonic Blade.

steps.title: 4.2–4.3 Thunder/Gizmo optionals
steps.do: Thunder the District 3 wire to power the Gizmo shop → Postcards #7–8. Thunder the Wonderland bells for puppies.

items.label: Dalmatians 58, 59, 60 — Wonderland hidden flower area (Thunder the bells)
All 8 treasure chests in this world swept

phases.title: 5 · Deep Jungle
phases.blurb: Tarzan, Sabor, Clayton/Stealth Sneak, Red Trinity, Cure, Jungle Slider + Vine-Jump minigames. [30 treasures]

steps.title: 5.1 Through the jungle
steps.do: Slide-puzzle of areas; gather puppies, learn Cure after Clayton.

steps.title: 5.2 Traverse Town — new Gummi
steps.do: Red Trinity alley puppies; Secret Waterway opens (Leon, Earthshine Gem → Simba). Bell puzzle → Opposite Armor → Aero. Synthesis still locked.

steps.title: 5.2 Simba summon
steps.do: Give Cid the Old Book → deliver to Merlin → learn Simba from the fairy. 100 Acre Wood Part 1 now available.

steps.title: 5.3 Jungle Slider + Vine Jump
steps.do: Slider levels 1–5 give Elixir/AP+/Dark Matter/DIF+/ATT+. Win ≥1 Vine-Jump round — REQUIRED for the Journal/secret ending.

items.label: All 30 treasure chests in this world swept

steps.missableNote: The Vine-Jump minigame must be played at least once or the Journal can't hit 100% (and on Standard the secret ending won't unlock).

phases.title: 6 · Agrabah
phases.blurb: Cave of Wonders, Jafar/Genie Jafar, Ansem's Report 1, Green Trinity → Synthesis unlocks, Genie summon. [41 treasures]

steps.title: 6.1 Cave of Wonders
steps.do: Pot Centipede, Abu statue puzzles, the first Pooh Torn Page, Jafar then Genie Jafar.

items.label: Dalmatians 37, 38, 39 — Cave of Wonders — Treasure Room

steps.missableNote: Push the rock off the Bottomless-Hall cliff and into the Relic Chamber to reach the rare Mythril; the Silent Chamber door needs a later jump upgrade.

steps.title: 6.2 Synthesis unlocks
steps.do: Green Trinity opens the Moguri Synthesis shop. Postcard #9. Pooh Part 2 → Naturespark → Bambi summon.

items.label: All 41 treasure chests in this world swept

phases.title: 7 · Monstro
phases.blurb: Parasite Cage ×2, High Jump, Stop, Geppetto's Gummi blueprints, Dumbo summon. [29 treasures]

steps.title: 7.1 Inside the whale
steps.do: Parasite Cage → Cheer; then learn High Jump from the chest by Geppetto.

steps.title: 7.x Agrabah w/ High Jump
steps.do: Return for the high-jump puppies and chests.

items.label: Dalmatians 49, 50, 51 — Cave of Wonders entrance (barrel + jump)
Dalmatians 46, 47, 48 — Dark Chamber statue room (High Jump)

steps.title: 7.x Geppetto & Dumbo
steps.do: Geppetto's home → Gummi blueprints (enter 30× → Chocobo; more by mob-kill count). Merlin → Spellbinder Keyblade + Dumbo summon. Buy Magus Staff / Gigas Fist.

items.label: All 29 treasure chests in this world swept

phases.title: 8 · Atlantica
phases.blurb: Swimming world. Ursula ×2, Mermaid Kick, Ansem's Report 3, Crabclaw. [23 treasures]

steps.title: 8.1 Undersea search
steps.do: Crystal Trident quest, Shark, the Pooh Torn Page in Ariel's grotto, Ursula in her cove → Mermaid Kick.

steps.title: 8.1 Ursula (rematch)
steps.do: Final Ursula. Thundara upgrade, Report 3, then Crabclaw on locking the world.

items.label: All 23 treasure chests in this world swept

phases.title: 9 · Halloween Town
phases.blurb: Lock/Shock/Barrel, Oogie Boogie ×2, Ansem's Report 7, Aero White-Mushroom master, Dream Shield. [11 treasures]

steps.title: 9.1 Oogie's Manor
steps.do: Jack joins. Torn Page in the lab. Lock/Shock/Barrel, then Oogie Boogie and his Manor.

steps.title: 9.x Red Trinity puppies
steps.do: Bring Donald+Goofy for the Red Trinity, then grab the guillotine-pit puppies.

items.label: Dalmatians 40, 41, 42 — Oogie's Manor (Red Trinity arc + guillotine pit)

steps.title: 9.x Dream Shield
steps.do: Last Pooh page available. If all 7 White-Mushroom masters are collected, Merlin gives the Dream Shield (Goofy).

items.label: All 11 treasure chests in this world swept

phases.title: 10 · Neverland
phases.blurb: Anti-Sora, Captain Hook, Glide, Report 9, Tinker Bell, Clock Tower opens, Hercules Cup → Yellow Trinity. [28 treasures]

steps.title: 10.1 Captain Hook's ship
steps.do: Anti-Sora, fix the clock, Hook. Glide + Tinker Bell + Fairy Harp + Report 9.

items.label: Dalmatians 82, 83, 84 — The hold (fly to the roof beam)

steps.title: 10.x Hercules Cup → Yellow Trinity
steps.do: Clear Pegasus then Hercules Cup (beat Hercules) to earn Olympia + the Yellow Trinity. Lock the Coliseum keyhole (Yellow Trinity by Phil).

steps.title: 10.x Glide / Yellow-Trinity sweep
steps.loc: Wonderland / Jungle / Halloween / Agrabah / Neverland / Traverse
steps.do: Use Glide + Yellow Trinity to mop up puppies and chests across worlds; the 81-puppy Dalmatians reward is Ultima-G.

items.label: Dalmatians 85, 86, 87 — Neverland hold secret room (Yellow Trinity)
All 28 treasure chests in this world swept

steps.title: 10.x Clock Tower rewards
steps.do: Time-gated perma-boosts; the door matching your play-hour glows. See the Clock Tower checklist phase — keep checking it after every world.

phases.title: 11 · Mastery Pt 1 · Moguri Craft
phases.blurb: Farm every synthesis material BEFORE the next world floods old worlds with tougher mobs. Unlock Encounter Plus at 15 crafts.

steps.title: Material farming sweep
steps.do: Collect the full shard/stone/gem set the guide lists, then craft all available items once (16 crafts → Encounter Plus).
steps.missableNote: The guide farms here because after Hollow Bastion, stronger Heartless mix into earlier worlds and make material farming far more tedious. Not blocked — just much faster now.

phases.title: 12 · Hollow Bastion Pt 1
phases.blurb: Riku, Maleficent (+Dragon), Riku-Ansem, White Trinity, library puzzle, Report 5, Oathkeeper, Mushu. [35 treasures]

steps.title: 12.1 Into the fortress
steps.do: Crystal-lift puzzles + the library book puzzle. White Trinity from Riku; puppies along the way.

items.label: Dalmatians 97, 98, 99 — Library — Lift Stop (Gravira the platform)
Dalmatians 94, 95, 96 — Outside area 16 (Gravira the caged chest)
Turned the High-Tower red crystal blue (unlocks Ramuh Belt later)

steps.missableNote: Turn the High-Tower red crystal blue now, or you can't reach the Ramuh Belt in the library on the 2nd visit.

steps.title: 12.x Maleficent & Riku-Ansem
steps.do: Maleficent → Dragon Maleficent (Fireglow → Mushu), Report 5, Riku-Ansem → Ragnarok.

steps.title: 12.x Traverse — Oathkeeper
steps.do: White Trinity Orichalcum, story scenes → Oathkeeper Keyblade, Lord Fortune for Donald.

items.label: All 35 treasure chests in this world swept

phases.title: 13 · Mastery Pt 2 · World Trinities
phases.blurb: White-Trinity sweep across all worlds (now that you have it) + Lady Luck Keyblade. Last puppies hide here too.

steps.title: White Trinity world sweep
steps.do: Hit every White Trinity for unique items/keyblades. See the Trinity checklist phase to tick each one.

phases.title: 14 · Hollow Bastion Pt 2
phases.blurb: Behemoth, Divine Rose, last Dalmatians, Aerith's 4 Reports + Report 8 (Hades Cup), Shiva Belt. [9 treasures]

steps.title: 14.x Second descent
steps.do: Trinity quest completes (all 46). Ramuh Belt, Divine Rose from Belle, last puppies, Behemoth → Omega Arts.

items.label: Dalmatians 61, 62, 63 — Grand Hall (last triad — Glide to it)
All 99 Dalmatians freed (Full Gummi Set + Aeroga)

steps.title: 14.x Aerith's reports
steps.do: Aerith hands over Reports 2, 4, 6, 10 and upgrades Cure→Curaga.

steps.title: 14.x Hades Cup
steps.do: The Hades Cup (unlocks now). Match 10 Hades → Report 8 + Antimaga. Winning the cup = the Proud secret-ending requirement. Blizzaga torches → Shiva Belt.

items.label: All 9 treasure chests in this world swept

phases.title: 15 · End of the World Pt 1
phases.blurb: Invisible labyrinth, Terminus linked-worlds, Chernabog, Superglide. STOP before the Final Rest door. [28 treasures]

steps.title: 15.x Through End of the World
steps.do: Behemoth gauntlets, the per-world gem chests, Mighty Shield, Chernabog → Superglide. Then the LAST farming spot (Gale / Stormy Stone / final White Mushroom).

items.label: All 28 treasure chests in this world swept

steps.missableNote: ⚠ POINT OF NO RETURN: opening the graceful door in Final Rest starts the unskippable endgame. Do ALL side quests (Ch.16) and a full Journal audit FIRST.

phases.title: 16 · Mastery Pt 3 · Superbosses & Ultima
phases.blurb: The hardest content: all FM superbosses, Ultima Weapon synthesis (33/33), and the final Journal audit. This is real 100%.

steps.title: Craft everything (33/33)
steps.do: Buy enough Orichalcum to finish, craft all 33 recipes including the EXP Bracelet, Fantasista, Seven Elements, and the Ultima Weapon.

steps.title: The Final Mix superbosses
steps.loc: Neverland / Deep Jungle / Agrabah / Hollow Bastion / Olympus
steps.do: Each is its own Journal entry — all required for true 100%.

items.label: ★ Phantom (Neverland Clock Tower) → Stopga + Clock Tower reopens
★ Kurt Zisa (Agrabah, talk to Carpet) → Report 11
Pot Scorpion (Agrabah Palace gates) — Mythril Stone farm

steps.missableNote: Phantom must be beaten to re-open the Neverland Clock Tower. Win the Hades Cup (Ch.14) for the Proud secret ending.

steps.title: Final Journal audit
steps.do: Before the finale: 99 Dalmatians, 46 Trinities, 13 Reports, all postcards mailed, all Cups, 100 Acre Wood done, White Mushroom masters, Clock Tower rewards, Gummi blueprints, Synthesis 33/33, all summons. Confirm Journal reads 100%.
steps.missableNote: Last checkpoint before the point of no return. Anything not done here is far harder (or impossible) to finish after the finale.

phases.title: 17 · End of the World Pt 2
phases.blurb: The final boss gauntlet and the secret movie.

steps.title: 17.x The final door
steps.do: Ansem, Darkside, Ansem, then World of Chaos (7 rounds). Lock the final door. Watch the secret movie after the credits.

items.label: Beat the World of Chaos · KH locked

phases.title: ✓ Trinity Marks (46)
phases.blurb: Every Trinity in the game, per cR0Ck's Trinity reference. Blue×17, Red×6, Green×9, Yellow×4, White×10. Many are story-required; tick each as you use it.

items.label: Blue Trinity — Traverse — 60 Munny (near world exit)
Blue Trinity — Traverse — Merlin's house (Camping set)
Blue Trinity — Wonderland — Lotus Forest entrance
Blue Trinity — Wonderland — Lotus Forest (pond area)
Blue Trinity — Olympus — left of entrance (Mythril Shard)
Blue Trinity — Olympus — right of entrance (Dalmatians 22–24)
Blue Trinity — Deep Jungle — Upper tree area
Blue Trinity — Agrabah — under the Bottomless Hall
Blue Trinity — Monstro — outside (2 Potions + Cottage)
Blue Trinity — Hollow Bastion — Waterway small room
Blue Trinity — Hollow Bastion — Waterway Up
Red Trinity — Traverse — above Gizmo building (bell)
Red Trinity — Agrabah — Cave Treasure Room
Red Trinity — Hollow Bastion — Hall upper level (story)
Green Trinity — Traverse — Accessories shop (opens Synthesis)
Green Trinity — Wonderland — Bizarre Room chimney (shrink)
Green Trinity — Olympus — near world exit (Mythril)
Green Trinity — Deep Jungle — above the Tunnel
Green Trinity — Monstro — atop Geppetto's boat (High Jump)
Green Trinity — Hollow Bastion — Library (yellow book, story)
Yellow Trinity — Traverse — behind Merlin's house (AP+)
Yellow Trinity — Olympus — inside, by Phil (locks world)
Yellow Trinity — Agrabah — Cave Hall floor
Yellow Trinity — Neverland — hold secret room (Dalmatians 85–87 etc.)
White Trinity — Wonderland — Scrambled-2 secret garden (Lady Luck)
White Trinity — Olympus — center of plaza (Violetta)
White Trinity — Deep Jungle — Cavern of Hearts (Orichalcum)
White Trinity — Agrabah — first Cave room (Ifrit Belt)
White Trinity — Hollow Bastion — icy entrance (Thundaga-G)

phases.title: ✓ Olympus Cups
phases.blurb: Each cup has Normal / Sora-Alone / Time-Trial challenges. The Hades Cup win is the Proud secret-ending requirement; Gold/Platinum matches are the Ice Titan/Sephiroth superbosses (tracked in Ch.16).

phases.title: ✓ 100 Acre Wood
phases.blurb: Restore 5 torn pages (found across worlds) and clear each minigame's score goal; finish for the EXP Ring and the final Cheer reward.

steps.title: 5 Torn Pages restored
steps.do: Pages: Agrabah, Monstro, Traverse (51 puppies), Atlantica, Halloween.

steps.title: Minigames cleared
steps.do: Hit each score goal for the page reward.

items.label: Roo baseball — 20 pts < 30s + all 5 Rare Nuts

phases.title: ✓ Mushrooms & rare Heartless
phases.blurb: Master each magic on a White Mushroom (→ Dream Shield), and the bounce/secret-Heartless extras the Journal tracks.

steps.title: White Mushroom — 7 magic masters
steps.do: Cast the matching spell 3× by location.

items.label: Master of Stop (Atlantica, inside the ship)

steps.title: Bounce & rare-Heartless extras
steps.do: Optional Journal flavour + farm bosses.

phases.title: ✓ Neverland Clock Tower (12)
phases.blurb: Open the door matching your in-game play-hour for a reward; one per hour 1–12. Locks while you're between Ch.11 and beating Phantom — keep coming back.

phases.title: ✓ Gummi Blueprints (Geppetto)
phases.blurb: Geppetto rewards blueprints by total Heartless defeated. Enter his house 30× then talk to Pinocchio for Chocobo.

phases.title: ✓ Synthesis (Moguri)
phases.blurb: Craft each recipe once; tiers unlock in groups. 15 crafts → Encounter Plus, 30 → final tier, 33 → Ultima Weapon. (Items also itemized in Ch.11/16.)
